title: polypodium contractum
intro: Polypodium contractum, also known as Contractile Polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium contractum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune system function. The herbal preparations of Polypodium contractum include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
